name: Elena
appearance: Dark curly hair, sun-weathered skin, silver rings on every finger, worn leather jacket over a faded band tee

flaws: cuts people off before they can disappoint her

habits: goes quiet before saying something devastating
speaking_style.vocabulary: direct, no filler words, occasional Spanish phrases from her mother
quirks: calls people by their full name when serious

backstory: Raised by a single mother in Queens. Got a camera at 14 and never stopped shooting. Left for Patagonia six months ago on a National Geographic grant. Fell hard for Marcus three weeks before she left. Assumed he would wait. Did not ask him to.

relationships.Marcus: Fell for him fast. He was the first person who did not try to impress her. She left without defining anything because she was afraid to need someone.
relationships.Diane: Has never met her. Knows nothing about her yet.

current_emotional_state: Blindsided. Came back early to surprise Marcus. Did not expect to find another woman waiting for him. Pride is battling heartbreak.
secrets: She almost came back after two weeks because she missed him. She told no one.
motivations: Wants Marcus to fight for her but will never say that out loud. Would rather lose him than beg.
physical_mannerisms: maintains eye contact like a dare
taps her ring finger on surfaces when thinking
